title: Sign in and land on dashboard
description: Verifies that an operator can sign in with valid credentials and is taken to the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Sign in and access dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in and is taken to the dashboard where overview content is displayed.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Route guarding requires authentication for dashboard
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access the dashboard is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Route guarding blocks unauthenticated access to protected pages
description: Verifies unauthenticated users cannot access protected routes and are redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to sign in

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: Verifies that submitting invalid credentials prevents sign-in and shows a credential validation error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-user into the username field
Fill invalid-pass into the password field
Verify a credential validation error is visible

title: Reject invalid sign-in credentials
description: Verifies invalid login credentials are rejected and the user remains unable to access the app.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify a login error is visible

title: Session persists across page refresh on dashboard
description: Verifies that after signing in, refreshing the dashboard keeps the user signed in and on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user remains on the dashboard

title: Route guarding requires authentication for clients
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access clients is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Add a new client and see it in the list
description: Verifies that an operator can create a client from the add client modal and the client appears in the clients list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to clients
Fill New Client UI Test into the client name field
Fill a valid identifier into the client account field
Verify the newly created client appears in the clients list

title: Session persists across page refresh on protected route
description: Verifies a signed-in user remains authenticated after refreshing a protected page and can still view the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user remains on an authenticated dashboard view

title: View dashboard overview and filter by router
description: Verifies that the dashboard loads key overview sections and that filtering by router updates the displayed dashboard metrics.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard content to load
Select a specific router in the router filter
Verify the dashboard charts and statistics reflect the selected router

title: Route guarding requires authentication for all transactions
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access all transactions is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Bulk extend service for expired clients
description: Verifies that an operator can filter to expired clients, select multiple clients, bulk extend service, and see expiry dates updated.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to clients
Select expired customers in the status filter
Select multiple customers from the list
Start the bulk extend service action
Confirm the bulk extend service action
Verify the selected customers show updated expiry dates

title: Filter transactions and export filtered results
description: Verifies finance staff can filter transactions by date range and router and export results that match the visible filtered dataset.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open all transactions
Fill a valid start date into the date range start field
Fill a valid end date into the date range end field
Wait for the transaction list to update
Trigger export of the filtered transactions
Verify an export preview or export-ready dataset summary matches the current filtered list totals/counts

title: Route guarding requires authentication for packages
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access packages is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Route guarding requires authentication for MikroTik management
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access MikroTik management is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Validate required fields in add client form
description: Verifies that attempting to save a client with missing required fields shows validation errors and does not create the client.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to clients
Save the client without filling required fields
Verify form validation errors are visible

title: Filter clients by status
description: Verifies that an operator can filter the clients list by a status and the list updates to match the selected status filter.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to clients
Select a status in the status filter
Verify the clients list updates to show only clients matching the selected status

title: Create and edit a service package
description: Verifies an operator can create a package and later edit it so the updated details persist and display in the package list/details.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open packages
Fill Starter Plan A into the package name field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select valid upload and download bandwidth limits
Open the package details for Starter Plan A
Update the price field to a different valid value
Update the duration/validity to a different valid value
Verify the package shows the updated price and validity in its details or list entry

title: Register a MikroTik router and see it in the list
description: Verifies a network technician can register a router with access code and VPN mode and the new router appears in the routers list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open MikroTiks
Fill Test Router 1 into the router name field
Fill a valid-format access code into the access code field
Verify the new router appears in the router list

title: Paginate transaction list
description: Verifies the transaction list supports pagination and the user can navigate to another page of results.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open all transactions
Go to the next page of transactions
Verify a different page of transaction rows is displayed

title: Validate required fields when creating a package
description: Verifies the add package form prevents saving when required inputs are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open packages
Attempt to save the package without filling required fields
Verify form validation errors are visible and the package is not created

title: Start router setup wizard and reach connection check step
description: Verifies a technician can open a router, start the setup wizard, and proceed through the steps to the connection check screen.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open MikroTiks
Fill Test Router Wizard 1 into the router name field
Fill a valid-format access code into the access code field
Open the router details for Test Router Wizard 1
Proceed to the step that provides the setup script
Proceed to the connection check step
Verify the wizard displays a connection check status area for the router
